revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Text replacement - "市町村別" to " by Municipality"
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:三郷町の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture of Misato Town]]: Merge [[Category:三郷町の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture of Misato Town]] via bot
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Merge [[Category:奈良県の建築物 ( by Municipality)]] into [[Category:Buildings in Nara Prefecture by Municipality]] via bot
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28696242)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[奈良県]][[三郷町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:さんこうちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|さんこうちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:三郷町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:三郷町の建築物|version=61571759}} {{translated page|ja|三郷町の建築物|2=Category:三郷町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[Ja:Category:三郷町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tatsuta Taisha]] {{Wikidata link|Q28696242}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Buildings in Nara Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Sangō, Nara]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]
